notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Byron Buxton singles on a ground ball to second baseman Richie Palacios. Byron Buxton to 2nd. Byron Buxton advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Richie Palacios.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Brooks Lee reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Ben Williamson.

notableEvents.detail: Brooks Lee reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Ben Williamson.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Brooks Lee reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Jonathan Aranda.

notableEvents.label: Jonny DeLuca pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonny DeLuca doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Austin Martin.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Brooks Lee reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Brooks Lee reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Ben Williamson.

notableEvents.label: Victor Caratini GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Victor Caratini grounds into a double play, pitcher Kevin Kelly to shortstop Ben Williamson to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Ryan Jeffers out at 2nd. Victor Caratini out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brooks Lee reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Brooks Lee reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Jonathan Aranda.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Byron Buxton challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Brooks Lee steals (1) 2nd base.
